summary: Formalized native language review intake so future locale approvals do not rely on ad hoc chat statements. Added a required protocol covering scoped review setup, source/build baseline, TestFlight Build Info gate, reviewer packet, device surface pass, structured signoff, proof artifact preservation, validation, and proof-claim boundaries. Added a reusable native review intake template and recorded Karoline's observed Build Info values as build-info-observed provenance only.

contract_status_changes.before: German native review was recorded from project-owner/user-reported approval, with later chat screenshots recorded as scoped observations and no reusable formal reviewer intake template.
contract_status_changes.after: Future native review requires a scoped baseline, Build Info gate for TestFlight/device review, reviewer packet, device surface pass, structured signoff, proof artifact preservation, validation, and explicit proof-claim boundaries before marking entries native-reviewed.

contract_status_changes.before: Karoline's second chat-provided Build Info screenshot was not represented in durable proof metadata.
contract_status_changes.after: The German proof record preserves the observed version 0.2.0, build 20260517151819, commit f6325f3c28e9e9263eebbe76a3bbba777ff6e615, branch main, and local verification that the commit's Xcode project matches that version/build. The classification remains build-info-observed only.

residual_risks: Karoline's Build Info screenshot binary is still not committed, so there is no hashable screenshot artifact or dimensions.
The visible Build Info screenshot supports version/build/commit provenance only; it does not prove full TestFlight language behavior or all reviewed surfaces.
The formal workflow is documentation and template infrastructure; future locale reviews still need reviewers to complete the template and return corrected values.
recommended_next_reason: Supervisor dry-run after marking this slice done reported: stop: no eligible queued slice found.
